reviews.review_description: I loaded this app on my Galaxy s10 plus, and began to view the Atlanta symphony. My Gear locked up, and so did my phone. Removing the phone from the Gear will not unlock my phone. Every attempt presents high latency when drawing the pattern to unlock. can't get into my new phone nor can I delete the app. Install with caution!!!!

Contact education@gpb.org to schedule a classroom visit from our Mobile VR Lab. We will bring a class set of Oculus Go's so your entire class can explore this amazing content! Use this app to access content from Georgia Public Broadcasting. At this writing, content includes virtual explorations of the Civil Rights Movement, Slavery and Freedom, the Georgia Forestry industry, and virtual/360º field trips to New Echota (capital of the Cherokee Nation) and the Little White House (FDR's residence in Warm Springs, GA). There are also 360º videos of the Atlanta Symphony Orchestra performing three different pieces, including the Imperial March (Darth Vader's theme). Disclosure: This is the account of our Education Outreach department, hence the advertising!
